updates.message: Happy May Day, Nadav! A few things worth knowing this afternoon: Major "May Day Strong" protests and economic blackouts are happening across the US today — 3,500+ events nationwide, so expect potential traffic or disruptions. Markets are looking strong — S&P 500 and Nasdaq both hit new closing highs. And there's an Iran ceasefire situation developing, with Senate blocking a war powers resolution. Stay tuned on that one.
